title: Random Character Rounds
description: Random Character Rounds is a 10-week community art initiative inviting 2D artists to interpret weekly character prompts in their own style, encouraging cc0 submissions and expanding creative participation within the Yellow Collective ecosystem.
details: Random Character Rounds is a 10-week art series designed to bring more artists into the Yellow Collective and Warpcast community through weekly character-based creative challenges. Each round begins with a randomly written character description, ranging from simple early prompts to more detailed concepts over time, which artists interpret through full-color 2D illustrations, character poses, turnarounds, expression sheets, model sheets, gifs, or other eligible visual formats. While the artwork does not need to be directly Nouns-related, it may carry a Nounish spirit, and artists are encouraged to release their submissions as cc0 so the characters can be reused, remixed, animated, illustrated, and expanded by others. The project emphasizes originality, human-made art, and creative interpretation, with AI-generated or stolen work disqualified. By giving many artists the same starting point and celebrating the wide range of outcomes, Random Character Rounds creates a playful, accessible pathway for new creators to discover Yellow Collective, contribute to shared creative lore, and connect with a broader onchain art community.
